vocab.example: Although designer sneakers are exorbitant, their superior comfort and durability make them worth every penny.

vocab.meaning: tốn rất nhiều tiền / làm khánh kiệt túi tiền
vocab.example: I only buy high-end boots occasionally because I don't want to break the bank every time I go shopping.

vocab.meaning: một biểu tượng của địa vị / đẳng cấp
vocab.example: For many youngsters, wearing limited-edition shoes from famous brands is seen as a status symbol.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc cực kỳ sang trọng, chỉn chu (từ đầu đến chân)
vocab.example: When I'm dressed to the nines for a gala, a pair of luxury brand oxfords is an absolute must.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: Those Italian leather shoes cost an arm and a leg, but the craftsmanship is unparalleled.

vocab.meaning: hàng thật, không phải hàng giả/nhái
vocab.example: I prefer saving up to buy the real McCoy from an official store rather than risking a cheap knock-off.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ phổ biến, đang là mốt
vocab.example: Chunky-soled shoes from famous designers are currently all the rage among fashion enthusiasts.

vocab.meaning: luôn muốn theo kịp người khác về vật chất/đẳng cấp
vocab.example: I don't buy big-name brands just to keep up with the Joneses; I prioritize quality over social image.

vocab.meaning: trả một mức giá quá đắt
vocab.example: You often have to pay through the nose for the logo, but the after-sales service is usually excellent.
I love this brand because their running shoes always fit like a glove right out of the box.
